title: Agent Provider Random Disconnect
objective: Prove OpenClaw can recover when the provider connection drops mid-response, reconnect to the provider, complete the turn, and keep the gateway healthy.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the disconnecting mock provider.

phases.title: Disconnect Recovery Turn
phases.intent: Send a simple message while the first provider connection drops and require OpenClaw to reconnect, continue, and return a normal assistant response.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-random-disconnect --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Disconnect Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after provider disconnect recovery.
